testcase.name: aggregators > sum > should sum positive numbers
aggregators > sum > should sum negative numbers
aggregators > sum > should sum mixed positive and negative numbers
aggregators > sum > should return 0 for empty array
aggregators > sum > should handle single element
aggregators > sum > should handle decimal numbers
aggregators > sum > should handle zeros
aggregators > average > should calculate average of positive numbers
aggregators > average > should calculate average of negative numbers
aggregators > average > should calculate average of mixed numbers
aggregators > average > should return 0 for empty array
aggregators > average > should handle single element
aggregators > average > should handle decimal numbers
aggregators > average > should handle identical numbers
aggregators > count > should count array elements
aggregators > count > should return 0 for empty array
aggregators > count > should count single element
aggregators > count > should count string array
aggregators > count > should count mixed array
aggregators > count > should count object array
QueryBuilder > constructor > should create an instance
QueryBuilder > constructor > should initialize with empty filters
QueryBuilder > addFilter > should add a filter
QueryBuilder > addFilter > should chain multiple filters
QueryBuilder > addFilter > should return this for chaining
QueryBuilder > addFilter > should handle numeric values
QueryBuilder > addFilter > should handle boolean values
QueryBuilder > addFilter > should handle null values
QueryBuilder > build > should return object with filters array
QueryBuilder > build > should include all added filters
QueryBuilder > build > should return empty filters when none added
QueryBuilder > build > should return updated filters after adding more
